name: SOC Prime — Detection content (Sigma)
description: Imports detection content (Sigma rules) from SOC Prime's Threat Detection Marketplace / Platform (https://socprime.com) — the world's largest library of curated, behavior-based detections. Each Sigma rule is imported into XTHREAT.SIGMARULE (idempotent by rule reference), where it boosts the Threat-Informed Defense 'detect' pillar and Purple-Team coverage; AND it is recorded as an XTHREAT.INTELEXCHANGE item so the detection shows in the intel feed and its MITRE ATT&CK techniques (from the rule's `tags: attack.tXXXX`) are cross-linked into INTELEXCHANGEATTACK for ATT&CK coverage. Read-only, non-intrusive, Python stdlib only (PyYAML used if installed, else a built-in Sigma field extractor). Live mode needs the worker env var SOCPRIME_API_KEY (and optional SOCPRIME_API_URL). Offline import is supported via the 'file'/'path' parameter — a single Sigma .yml file, a directory of .yml rules, or a JSON list/export of rules.

parameters.name: path
parameters.help: Offline mode: a Sigma rule file (.yml), a directory of Sigma rules, or a JSON list/export of rules to import. Worker-local.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Alias of 'path' (a saved SOC Prime / Sigma export JSON).

parameters.name: max_items
parameters.help: Maximum number of detection rules to import.
